name: DemoExchange
description: Demo Exchange. This exchange uses connects to mock HTTP server and websocket server. It is used to test and validate a full Java wrapper generated using JXAPI.

properties.name: websocketHeartBeatInterval
properties.description: Mock websocket server expected heartBeat interval

properties.name: responseCodeOk
properties.description: Possible value in responseCode field of rest request response: Successful response

properties.name: responseCodeInternalServerError
properties.description: Possible value in responseCode field of rest request response: Server internal error

constants.name: httpServerHostWildcard
constants.description: Value to substitute with actual HTTP server host in httpUrl

constants.name: httpServerPortWildcard
constants.description: Value to substitute with actual HTTP server host in httpUrl

constants.name: websocketServerHostWildcard
constants.description: Value to substitute with actual HTTP server host in httpUrl

constants.name: websocketServerPortWildcard
constants.description: Value to substitute with actual HTTP server host in httpUrl

apis.name: MarketData
apis.description: Demo exchange market data API to retrieve

constants.name: allTickers
constants.description: Constant for subscribing to all tickers

restEndpoints.name: exchangeInfo
restEndpoints.description: Fetch market information of symbols that can be traded

properties.name: symbols
properties.description: The list of symbol to fetch market information for. Leave empty to fetch all markets

properties.name: payload
properties.description: List of market information for each requested symbol

properties.name: orderTickSize
properties.description: Price precision. Prce of an order should be a multiple of this value

restEndpoints.name: tickers
restEndpoints.description: Fetch current tickers for all markets

properties.name: volume
properties.description: Total traded amount in base asset during the last 24h from now

properties.name: symbol
properties.description: Symbol to subscribe to ticker stream of

properties.name: volume
properties.description: Total traded amount in base asset during the last 24h from now
